note: High-water mark for /sync-upstream. This repo's .claude harness was bootstrapped on 2026-06-13 by porting from the upstream template repo (telecom/3GPP) and retargeting it to LLM/AI surveys; this SHA is the upstream HEAD as of that bootstrap (last upstream commit on/before 2026-06-13). The next /sync-upstream diffs <last_synced_commit>..HEAD for config paths only, re-adapts each delta to the LLM/AI domain, then advances this marker. See the claude-infra-ported-from-data-channel-receiver memory.
